page_metadata.biotools__summary:
A probabilistic model for estimating splice site usage from RNA-seq data.

McSplicer is a probabilistic model for estimating splice site usages, rather than modeling an individual outcome of a splicing process such as exon skipping.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary:
A probabilistic model for estimating splice site usage from RNA-seq data.

McSplicer is a probabilistic model for estimating splice site usages, rather than modeling an individual outcome of a splicing process such as exon skipping.
